items.title: Sherwin-Williams Board of Directors Elects Benjamin E. Meisenzahl as CFO Effective January 1, 2026
items.description: The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE: SHW) announced today that its Board of Directors has elected Benjamin E. Meisenzahl to serve as the Company's next Chief Financial Officer (CFO), effective January 1, 2026. Mr. Meisenzahl, 44, has served as Senior Vice President – Finance for the last two and a half years and brings 22 years of overall Sherwin-Williams experience to his new role. He will assume the CFO duties currently held by Allen J. Mistysyn, 57, who will assume a short-term transition role

items.title: What I Wish I Had Known Before Creating My Own Investing Blueprint
items.author: Reuben Gregg Brewer
items.description: An experienced investor shares his personal investment journey, highlighting the importance of emotional control, long-term dividend-focused investing, and avoiding impulsive decisions driven by greed or market noise.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The author regrets selling Sherwin-Williams stock early and recognizes it as a missed opportunity for significant long-term gains
Referenced as Warren Buffett's company, used as an example of a sound long-term investment strategy

items.title: Dividend Stocks That Can Help You Become a Millionaire
items.author: Justin Pope
items.description: The article highlights five blue-chip dividend stocks with consistent dividend growth potential that could help investors build long-term wealth through patient, strategic investing across diverse sectors.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Strong technology presence, consistent 23-year dividend growth, diverse business model with innovation in AI and cloud computing
Global franchise model, 49-year dividend growth streak, steady revenue from royalties and global expansion potential
Trusted enterprise HR solutions, 50-year dividend growth history, resilient business model in human resources management
Industry-leading paint and coatings company, 46-year dividend growth, technology-resistant business model
